Catalog/Joint Replacement/LATITUD Cemented Femoral Stem Narrow
🦿 ArthroplastyREF: STDM-00/XX

LATITUD Cemented Femoral Stem Narrow

LATITUD · Hip Stems

Narrow profile cemented femoral stem for patients with smaller canal dimensions. Designed for optimal fit in narrow femoral canals with cement fixation.

MaterialStainless Steel (Surgical Grade)
Frequently Asked Questions

Narrow profile cemented femoral stem for patients with smaller canal dimensions. Designed for optimal fit in narrow femoral canals with cement fixation.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the LATITUD Cemented Femoral Stem Narrow, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The LATITUD Cemented Femoral Stem Narrow is constructed using Stainless Steel (Surgical Grade), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
